creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: madpilot
Date: Mon Apr 22 18:00:46 2013
New Revision: 316251
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/316251

Log:
  - Update to 0.6.5
  
  PR:		ports/177583
  Submitted by:	Veniamin Gvozdikov <g.veniamin@googlemail.com> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/misc/qmetro/files/
  head/misc/qmetro/files/patch-rc_alarm.pri   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/misc/qmetro/Makefile
  head/misc/qmetro/distinfo
  head/misc/qmetro/pkg-plist

Modified: head/misc/qmetro/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/qmetro/Makefile	Mon Apr 22 17:58:03 2013	(r316250)
+++ head/misc/qmetro/Makefile	Mon Apr 22 18:00:46 2013	(r316251)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	qmetro
-PORTVERSION=	0.5.7
+PORTVERSION=	0.6.5
 CATEGORIES=	misc graphics
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/source/
 
@@ -12,7 +12,10 @@ COMMENT=	Map of the transport system for
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
 USE_ZIP=	yes
-USE_QT4=	gui xml qmake_build uic_build moc_build rcc_build
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
+USE_QT4=	gui xml qmake_build uic_build moc_build multimedia \
+		rcc_build
+USE_DOS2UNIX=	rc/alarm.pri
 
 do-configure:
 	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${QMAKE} ${QMAKEFLAGS} PREFIX=${PREFIX}

Modified: head/misc/qmetro/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/qmetro/distinfo	Mon Apr 22 17:58:03 2013	(r316250)
+++ head/misc/qmetro/distinfo	Mon Apr 22 18:00:46 2013	(r316251)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (qmetro-0.5.7.zip) = ef37eae4f46fc296211c31545699334c276ca11a78a6f757b9b663c4d70b99a3
-SIZE (qmetro-0.5.7.zip) = 915842
+SHA256 (qmetro-0.6.5.zip) = c9dcd7a14811064be7010e19097420cfcb25802a5511546960509da0bbcc59e2
+SIZE (qmetro-0.6.5.zip) = 1244346

Added: head/misc/qmetro/files/patch-rc_alarm.pri
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/misc/qmetro/files/patch-rc_alarm.pri	Mon Apr 22 18:00:46 2013	(r316251)
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+--- rc/alarm.pri.orig	2013-04-02 11:27:07.017366450 +0000
++++ rc/alarm.pri	2013-04-02 11:36:52.435366521 +0000
+@@ -8,13 +8,6 @@ QT += multimedia
+ CONFIG += mobility
+ MOBILITY = multimedia
+ 
+-unix:!macx:!maemo5:!contains(MEEGO_EDITION,harmattan):!symbian {
+-QT -= multimedia
+-INCLUDEPATH += /usr/include/QtMultimediaKit \
+-               /usr/include/QtMobility
+-#LIBS += -lQtMultimediaKit
+-}
+-
+ 
+ DEFINES += QMETRO_HAVE_ALARM=1
+ 

Modified: head/misc/qmetro/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/qmetro/pkg-plist	Mon Apr 22 17:58:03 2013	(r316250)
+++ head/misc/qmetro/pkg-plist	Mon Apr 22 18:00:46 2013	(r316251)
@@ -3,13 +3,15 @@ share/applications/qmetro.desktop
 share/icons/hicolor/64x64/apps/qmetro.png
 share/icons/hicolor/80x80/apps/qmetro.png
 share/icons/hicolor/scalable/apps/qmetro.svg
-share/qmetro/locale/cs.lng
-share/qmetro/locale/es.lng
-share/qmetro/locale/fr.lng
-share/qmetro/map/Moscow.pmz
-@dirrm share/qmetro/map
-@dirrm share/qmetro/locale
-@dirrm share/qmetro
+%%DATADIR%%/locale/cs.lng
+%%DATADIR%%/locale/es.lng
+%%DATADIR%%/locale/fr.lng
+%%DATADIR%%/map/Moscow.pmz
+%%DATADIR%%/skin/Android.zip
+@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/locale
+@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/map
+@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/skin
+@dirrm %%DATADIR%%
 @dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/scalable/apps
 @dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/scalable
 @dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/80x80/apps
@@ -17,4 +19,5 @@ share/qmetro/map/Moscow.pmz
 @dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/64x64/apps
 @dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/64x64
 @dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor
+@dirrmtry share/icons
 @dirrmtry share/applications
